summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Villa Paris new features. All 8 requested features tested and PASS.

issues: Next.js dev tools shows '1 Issue' badge (not a real app error, just dev tooling). Newly added tavoli/stazioni overlap at same position - user should drag to reposition.

test_credentials: None required - SQLite database at prisma/prisma/dev.db
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test events: TEST_Menu_Easy_Compleanno, TEST_Prezzo_Fallback
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working correctly. Event ID 3 used for piantina testing (has tavoli and stazioni). New test event 'Test Evento Menu Easy' created during testing on March 10, 2026.

1_calendario_filtri.details: Tutti/Confermati/Opzionati/Appuntamenti filter buttons present and clickable, filtering works

2_calendario_scorciatoie.details: +1 settimana and +1 mese buttons navigate calendar correctly

3_calendario_vai_data.details: Vai a data input (date picker) navigates calendar to selected date

4_nuovo_evento_menu_easy.details: Menu Easy section present with: menu base select dropdown, sovrapprezzo input, extra/accordi textarea, prezzo info box

5_nuovo_evento_save.details: Event creation with menu easy fields saves correctly, redirects to calendario, event appears on calendar

6_piantina_resize.details: Tavolo resize slider (range input) and resize handle (drag button) both present and functional. Stazione has width/height sliders.

7_piantina_save_persist.details: Adding tavolo/stazione and saving persists to database. Verified via API that disposizioneSala contains new elements after reload.

8_piantina_export.details: PNG, PDF, and Stampa (Print) buttons present and clickable without generating UI errors

9_report_excel_prezzo.details: Excel report contains 'Prezzo/Persona' column. Code correctly falls back to struttura.prezzo when event.prezzo is null/undefined.

api_verification.GET_api_eventi: 200 OK - returns 80 events with filter fields (tipo, stato, dataConfermata, dateProposte)
api_verification.POST_api_eventi_menu_easy: 200 OK - creates event with menu, struttura, prezzo fields
api_verification.PUT_api_eventi_disposizioneSala: 200 OK - saves disposizioneSala as JSON string correctly
api_verification.GET_api_report_azienda_xlsx: 200 OK - 20KB valid XLSX with Prezzo/Persona column
api_verification.GET_api_menu_base: 200 OK - returns menu base list for dropdown

playwright_tests.calendario_page: Loaded, filters clicked (Tutti/Confermati/Opzionati/Appuntamenti), +1 settimana, +1 mese, vai a data all working
playwright_tests.nuovo_evento_page: Menu Easy card visible, menu base select, sovrapprezzo input, extra textarea all present. Event saved successfully.
playwright_tests.piantina_evento_page: Tavolo selected, resize slider and handle visible, new tavolo/stazione added, save with success message, persistence verified on reload
